title: Crucible Mutation Recipe
description: How to run the repo's diff-scoped mutation tool and read its surviving mutants.

cmd.description: Command that runs mutation testing scoped to the diff (e.g. cargo-mutants --in-diff), printing surviving mutants.

cwd.description: Repo-relative working directory. Defaults to the repo root.

timeoutSec.description: Hard timeout; a timed-out run fails closed (never reads as clean).

memoryMb.description: Aggregate memory ceiling for the mutation command and its descendants. Exceeding it kills the entire process tree and fails closed.

base.description: Git base to diff against for the high-risk tier decision. Defaults to origin/master.

survivorPattern.description: Regex over the tool output; group 1=file, 2=line, 3=mutation description. Defaults to cargo-mutants MISSED lines. Override for Stryker or another tool.

$comment: The equivalent-mutant escape valve lives in .crucible/mutation-waivers.json: an array of { file, line?, mutation?, reason, approvedBy? }. A waiver must carry a reason, so 'everything is equivalent' cannot silently pass.
